aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some positive customer reviews and schema implementation, but lacks a substantial online presence and review volume.
quick_wins: Encourage satisfied customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search visibility.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, location-specific keywords, and a blog for increased organic traffic.
Implement a consistent citation strategy across major directories to enhance local SEO.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not actively utilized, with no reviews or regular updates, which limits its effectiveness in local search.
critical_issues: Insufficient business information and updates on the GBP.
Lack of engagement with customer queries and feedback on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across online directories, which can confuse search engines and potential customers.
action_items: Audit and update all NAP citations to ensure consistency across major directories like Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.
Claim and verify the business listing on Google, Bing, and Apple Maps.
Regularly monitor and manage citations to correct any inaccuracies.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP and the website.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Lakewood, Colorado, due to low review volume and limited local SEO efforts.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Encouraging customer reviews and improving GBP engagement.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, locally relevant content and building backlinks from local business directories and industry-related websites.
